business.name: H&F Heating and Air Conditioning, LLC
business.tagline: When your system fails, we fix it right

hero.headline: The HVAC team that *actually* diagnoses the problem
hero.subheadline: No guesswork, no quick fixes — we figure out what's wrong and fix it properly the first time.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every System, Every Problem
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to complete installations

services.title: Emergency HVAC Repair
services.description: System down? Flooding? Frozen lines? We diagnose the real problem and get you running again.

services.title: Central Air Installation
services.description: Complete system installs without tearing up your ceiling. We work around your home's layout.

services.title: System Diagnostics
services.description: We take the time to figure out what's actually wrong — not just swap parts and hope.

services.title: HVAC Maintenance
services.description: Keep your aging system running strong with proper maintenance and tune-ups.

about.heading: Real Techs, Real Solutions
about.body: We're the Hagerstown HVAC team that shows up with experience and actually diagnoses problems. No quick fixes, no part-swapping guesswork.

reviews.name: DJ M.
reviews.text: Hansel really took the time to figure out my A/C issues, explained how everything works, and sourced the exact parts I needed.

reviews.name: Katie B.
reviews.text: Hansel installed my new central air system and worked around my house to avoid cutting holes in the ceiling. Great communication throughout.

reviews.name: ben g.
reviews.text: Had flooding and a frozen line — system completely down. Expected the worst, but Hansel repaired my aging unit quickly instead of pushing a replacement.

cta.heading: System Acting Up?
cta.body: Don't wait for a complete breakdown. Get an honest diagnosis and upfront pricing from the team that actually fixes things right.
